step_description: Active session and wait class snapshot
narrative_hint: ETL_NightlyLoad is running during peak hours with CXPACKET waits indicating parallelism issues. Three APP_USER sessions are blocked waiting for shared locks (LCK_M_S) — almost certainly blocked by the ETL job. CPU and logical reads are heavily concentrated on the ETL session. Claude should identify ETL_USER as the dominant consumer causing secondary blocking and recommend investigating the ETL schedule and MAXDOP settings.
